fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the dimension value.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies a descriptive name for the dimension value.

fields.name: Dimension Value Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the purpose of the dimension value.

fields.name: Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a list of account numbers. The entries of the account will be totaled to give a total balance. How entries are totaled depends on the value in the Account Type field.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Consolidation Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that is used for consolidation.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how many spaces the text field for the dimension value is indented relative to the standard margin.
The field is filled in automatically when you click Actions, point to Functions, and then click Indent Dimension Values.
You can enter something in the field, but the contents will be replaced the next time you click Indent Dimension Values. Therefore, if you want a bigger indentation, add blank spaces with the spacebar before you enter the text.

fields.name: Global Dimension No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Map-to IC Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany's dimension code associated with the dimension of the current company.

fields.name: Map-to IC Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which intercompany dimension value corresponds to the dimension value on the line.

fields.name: Dimension Value ID
fields.tooltip:
Uniquely identifies a dimension value.

Additional Information

The field is automatically incremented and is used for reference in the Dimension Set Entry and Dimension Set Tree Node tables.
